name: Phishing Campaign Mass Remediation
description: Mass remediation workflow for phishing campaigns that target multiple users. AI analysis confirms the phishing threat, then a code node extracts all recipient email addresses from the alert. A loop iterates over each recipient to remove the phishing email from their mailbox via Microsoft Graph. After remediation, the security team is notified via Slack and the alert status is updated. Designed for large-scale phishing incidents affecting multiple mailboxes.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Remove phishing emails from recipient mailboxes via purge action

data.title: Phishing Campaign Alert
data.summary: Triggers on phishing campaign or mass phishing alerts

data.title: AI Phishing Analysis
data.summary: Confirm the phishing campaign threat level

config.custom_instructions: This is a potential phishing campaign affecting multiple users. Assess the threat level, identify the attack technique, and confirm whether mass remediation is warranted.

data.title: Extract Recipient List
data.summary: Extract all recipient email addresses from the alert

data.title: For Each Recipient
data.summary: Iterate over each affected recipient mailbox

data.title: Remove Phishing Email
data.summary: Purge the phishing email from current recipient's mailbox

data.title: Notify Security Team
data.summary: Send campaign remediation summary to Slack

config.note: Phishing campaign remediated. Removed phishing email from {{$.nodes.code-1.result.count}} mailboxes.

data.title: End — Campaign Remediated
data.summary: All phishing emails purged, team notified, status updated

config.summary: Phishing campaign fully remediated. Emails purged from all affected mailboxes, security team notified.
